betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Spent Fuel Pool Drum§f cools hot nuclear fuel rods from reactors.

§eCapacity:§f Holds §e12 slots§f of fuel rods.

§eCompatible Reactors:§f
• §bRBMK§f extracted fuel rods
• §bZIRNOX§f spent fuel
• §bPWR§f depleted fuel

§eRequirements:§f
• §cAt least one side must touch Water§f to function
• §aMore water contact = faster cooling§f

§aTip:§f Place in or adjacent to water pools for maximum cooling efficiency.
